1891650.name: Love You till the End
1891650.description:
This Is A Short Game

Steam Deck supported

Love In the Shadows

Experience an emotional rollercoaster as you assume the role of a monster, navigating in search of glimpses of the human girl who has stolen your monstrous heart.

Stealth Is Key

Embrace the art of stealth as you move through the shadows, avoiding detection at all costs.The stakes are high – if you're caught, it's not just your life on the line, but the delicate heart of the human girl as well.

A Heartfelt Connection

Your survival is intricately tied to the well-being of the human girl. If she catches sight of you, her heart may not withstand the shock, leading to dire consequences. Conversely, if you lose sight of her, the overwhelming sadness may prove fatal for your monstrous existence.
1891650.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 日语
